description: Distribution Agreement - governs the appointment, rights, and obligations of a distributor to market, promote, and sell a supplier's products within a defined territory

parties_and_appointment.description: Supplier and distributor identification, appointment scope, and authorized sales channels

agreement_title.description: Official title of the distribution agreement

effective_date.description: Date the distribution agreement becomes effective

supplier_name.description: Full legal name of the supplier, manufacturer, or principal appointing the distributor

supplier_address.description: Registered or principal business address of the supplier

supplier_jurisdiction_of_incorporation.description: State or country where the supplier entity is incorporated or organized

distributor_name.description: Full legal name of the appointed distributor

distributor_address.description: Registered or principal business address of the distributor

appointment_type.description: Nature of the distributor's appointment by the supplier

authorized_channels.description: Sales channels through which the distributor is authorized to sell the products

authorized_customer_segments.description: Customer types or market segments the distributor is authorized to serve

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the distribution agreement

dispute_resolution_method.description: Method for resolving disputes arising under the agreement

territory_and_exclusivity.description: Geographic territory definition, exclusivity grants, sub-distribution rights, and territorial restrictions

territory_definition.description: Detailed description of the geographic territory granted to the distributor

exclusivity_type.description: Whether the distribution rights are exclusive, sole, or non-exclusive within the territory

supplier_direct_sales_reserved.description: Whether the supplier retains the right to sell directly in the distributor's territory
extraction_hints: supplier reserves the right to sell directly

reserved_accounts.description: List of customer accounts reserved by the supplier and excluded from the distributor's appointment

sub_distribution_rights.description: Whether the distributor may appoint sub-distributors or sub-agents within the territory

online_sales_territory_restrictions.description: Restrictions on selling products online to customers outside the assigned territory

cross_border_sales_restrictions.description: Restrictions on the distributor selling or shipping products across borders outside the territory

territory_expansion_conditions.description: Conditions under which the territory may be expanded or additional territories granted
extraction_hints: right of first refusal for adjacent

products_and_pricing.description: Product catalog, pricing structure, price adjustments, minimum order quantities, and resale pricing

products_covered.description: List of products the distributor is authorized to distribute

product_name.description: Name or designation of the product

sku_or_part_number.description: Stock keeping unit, part number, or catalog reference

product_schedule_reference.description: Reference to an exhibit, schedule, or appendix listing the covered products

new_product_addition_process.description: Process for adding new products to the agreement over time

product_discontinuation_notice_days.description: Number of days advance notice the supplier must give before discontinuing a product

distributor_purchase_price.description: Wholesale or transfer price at which the distributor purchases products from the supplier

pricing_model.description: Method used to determine distributor purchase pricing

currency.description: Currency in which prices are quoted and invoiced

price_adjustment_mechanism.description: Mechanism, frequency, and limitations on supplier's ability to adjust prices

price_protection_period_days.description: Number of days of price protection on existing inventory after a price change

minimum_order_quantity.description: Minimum quantity per order the distributor must place

suggested_resale_price.description: Manufacturer's suggested retail price or recommended resale price

resale_price_restrictions.description: Whether the supplier imposes restrictions or guidelines on the distributor's resale pricing
extraction_hints: free to set its own prices

volume_discount_structure.description: Discount tiers based on purchase volume

tier_threshold.description: Volume or revenue threshold for the discount tier

discount_percentage.description: Discount percentage applicable to the tier

rebate_program.description: Structure and terms of any volume rebates, retrospective discounts, or incentive programs

ordering_and_fulfillment.description: Order process, lead times, shipping terms, delivery logistics, and acceptance procedures

ordering_process.description: Process and method for the distributor to place purchase orders with the supplier

order_acceptance_process.description: Supplier's process for accepting, rejecting, or confirming purchase orders

lead_time_days.description: Standard lead time in calendar days from order acceptance to shipment

expedited_order_availability.description: Whether expedited or rush orders are available and associated fees or conditions

forecast_requirements.description: Requirements for the distributor to provide demand forecasts to the supplier

frequency.description: How often forecasts must be submitted

horizon_months.description: Number of months the forecast must cover

binding_period.description: Portion of the forecast that becomes a binding purchase commitment

delivery_terms_incoterms.description: Applicable Incoterms or delivery terms governing risk and cost allocation

shipping_method.description: Specified or preferred method of shipping products to the distributor

freight_cost_responsibility.description: Which party bears the cost of freight and shipping

risk_of_loss_transfer.description: Point at which risk of loss or damage to products transfers from supplier to distributor

partial_shipments_allowed.description: Whether the supplier may fulfill orders through partial shipments

inspection_period_days.description: Number of days the distributor has to inspect and accept or reject delivered products

defective_product_return_process.description: Process for returning defective, damaged, or non-conforming products to the supplier

payment_terms.description: Payment methods, credit terms, invoicing procedures, currency, and late payment consequences

payment_terms_days.description: Number of days from invoice date within which payment must be made

accepted_payment_methods.description: Payment methods accepted by the supplier

credit_limit.description: Maximum credit limit extended to the distributor

credit_approval_required.description: Whether the supplier requires credit approval before accepting orders

invoicing_schedule.description: When and how invoices are issued by the supplier

early_payment_discount.description: Discount offered for early payment before the standard due date

late_payment_interest_rate.description: Interest rate or penalty applied to overdue payments

right_to_suspend_on_nonpayment.description: Supplier's right to suspend deliveries or terminate upon distributor's failure to pay

currency_exchange_risk.description: Which party bears the risk of currency exchange rate fluctuations

performance_obligations.description: Minimum purchase requirements, sales targets, marketing obligations, reporting duties, and training

minimum_annual_purchase_commitment.description: Minimum annual purchase volume or revenue the distributor must achieve

sales_targets.description: Specific sales targets or quotas by period, product line, or customer segment

period.description: Time period for the sales target

consequence_of_missing_targets.description: Consequences if the distributor fails to meet minimum purchase or sales targets

marketing_spending_obligation.description: Minimum marketing or advertising spend the distributor must invest in the territory

marketing_plan_submission.description: Requirements to submit annual or quarterly marketing plans for supplier approval

co_op_marketing_fund.description: Cooperative marketing fund contributions and reimbursement terms

trade_show_participation.description: Obligations to participate in industry trade shows, exhibitions, or conferences

sales_reporting_requirements.description: Requirements for the distributor to report sales data to the supplier

reporting_frequency.description: How often sales reports must be submitted

report_contents.description: Data elements that must be included in sales reports

inventory_reporting_requirements.description: Requirements for the distributor to report inventory levels to the supplier

dedicated_sales_staff_requirement.description: Requirements to employ dedicated sales personnel for the supplier's products

training_obligations.description: Requirements for distributor staff to complete product training or certification

customer_support_obligations.description: Level of after-sales support or customer service the distributor must provide to end customers

intellectual_property.description: Trademark usage, marketing materials, brand guidelines, co-branding, and IP protection obligations

trademark_license_grant.description: Grant of rights to use the supplier's trademarks, trade names, and logos for distribution purposes

trademark_usage_guidelines.description: Guidelines and restrictions on how the supplier's trademarks and logos may be used

marketing_material_approval.description: Whether the distributor must obtain supplier approval before using marketing materials

supplier_provided_marketing_materials.description: Marketing materials, samples, or collateral the supplier will provide to the distributor

co_branding_rights.description: Rights and restrictions regarding co-branding products or materials

private_labeling_rights.description: Whether the distributor may sell products under its own brand or private label

ip_ownership_statement.description: Statement confirming supplier's ownership of all intellectual property in the products

ip_infringement_notification.description: Distributor's obligation to notify the supplier of any IP infringement discovered in the territory

non_compete_on_ip.description: Restrictions on the distributor developing or distributing competing products using similar IP

warranties_and_liability.description: Product warranties, warranty pass-through, limitation of liability, indemnification, and product recalls

product_warranty_period_months.description: Duration of the product warranty in months from date of sale or delivery

warranty_scope.description: Scope of the product warranty including what is covered

warranty_pass_through_to_end_customers.description: Whether and how the supplier's warranty passes through the distributor to end customers

distributor_warranty_obligations.description: Warranty service obligations the distributor must perform on behalf of the supplier

warranty_claim_process.description: Process for handling warranty claims from end customers through the distributor

limitation_of_liability_cap.description: Maximum aggregate liability cap between the parties

consequential_damages_exclusion.description: Whether indirect, consequential, incidental, or special damages are excluded

supplier_indemnification_of_distributor.description: Supplier's obligation to indemnify the distributor for product liability and IP infringement claims

distributor_indemnification_of_supplier.description: Distributor's obligation to indemnify the supplier for claims arising from distributor's actions

product_recall_obligations.description: Responsibilities and cost allocation in the event of a product recall

product_liability_insurance_requirement.description: Product liability insurance the distributor must maintain

force_majeure.description: Force majeure provisions including qualifying events and relief available

term_and_termination.description: Agreement duration, renewal mechanics, termination rights, post-termination wind-down, and inventory buy-back

initial_term_months.description: Duration of the initial agreement term in months

auto_renewal.description: Whether the agreement automatically renews at the end of each term

renewal_term_months.description: Duration of each renewal term in months

non_renewal_notice_days.description: Number of days advance written notice required to prevent automatic renewal

termination_for_convenience_notice_days.description: Number of days written notice required to terminate the agreement without cause

termination_for_cause_grounds.description: Specific grounds that constitute cause for immediate or accelerated termination

cure_period_days.description: Number of days to cure a material breach before the other party may terminate

termination_for_change_of_control.description: Right to terminate if the distributor undergoes a change of ownership or control

post_termination_sell_off_period_days.description: Number of days after termination during which the distributor may sell remaining inventory

inventory_buyback_obligation.description: Whether the supplier must repurchase unsold inventory from the distributor upon termination

inventory_buyback_price.description: Price or formula at which the supplier will repurchase unsold inventory

return_of_marketing_materials.description: Obligations to return supplier-provided marketing materials, samples, and confidential information upon termination

customer_transition_obligations.description: Obligations to transition customer relationships and outstanding orders to the supplier or new distributor

survival_clauses.description: Provisions that survive termination or expiration of the agreement

non_compete_post_termination_months.description: Duration in months of any post-termination non-compete restriction on the distributor
